prompt: Write a paragraph about your favorite season. Do not use any punctuation whatsoever. No periods, commas, apostrophes, question marks, exclamation points, or any other punctuation marks.
response: My favorite season is autumn because the air feels crisp and the trees turn brilliant shades of red orange and gold I love walking outside and hearing the leaves crunch under my feet and I enjoy the calm cozy feeling that comes with shorter days and cooler evenings Autumn also brings warm drinks soft sweaters and a peaceful change in the world around me
